channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] thegentlemen ransomware: new victim 'Einstein Technology'
[DARK WEB] thegentlemen ransomware: new victim 'St Fabian Catholic'
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Unknown Stealer — 10 new IOCs detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: StrelaStealer — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with strelastealer .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ClearFake — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .

item.title: Bursa: Broker-level cyber incidents contained
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR: The latest cybersecurity incidents reported by a few brokers have been contained and all trading and market operations continue as normal, with no evidence of unauthorised trading activity or financial loss, Bursa Malaysia says. In the statement, Bursa Malaysia said it was informed by a few brokers that they had encountered cybersecurity incidents within their system component. “The affected brokers have contained the incidents through immediate isolation of the component and im...
